title: Improved Fishing Mod
description: Mod which intends to improve fishing with new fish and fishing equipment.
body:
Improved Fishing Mod

For fishing you are going to need to learn how to create every item so you can build a full rod and reel setup.
Bait will be required with different bait having a different outcome.
Better gear is available but it's harder to get and craft.
Start fishing and everything will start to make sense.
